title: Dungeons Swords
description: Makes the vanilla swords match the Dungeons art style!
body:
Makes the vanilla swords match the Dungeons art style!


Have you ever wanted to have the Minecraft Dungeons swords in the vanilla game? Well look no further, as Dungeons Swords looks to bring the sword textures from Dungeons into vanilla Minecraft!

*DISCLAMER*  The wooden, copper, and netherite swords have been untouched.
